data.description:

data.title: Crypto To Explode Higher Amid a ‘Powerful’ Altcoin Season, Predicts Economist Henrik Zeberg – But There’s a Catch
data.description:
Economist and macro strategist Henrik Zeberg is predicting that the crypto markets will see a massive surge to the upside as a powerful altcoin season looms. In a new thread, Zeberg tells his 196,600 followers on X that support from the Federal Reserve will cause a powerful altcoin season and send the crypto markets skyrocketing.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/09/05/crypto-to-explode-higher-amid-a-powerful-altcoin-season-predicts-economist-henrik-zeberg-but-theres-a-catch/

data.title: TMTG acquires 684M CRO tokens as part of Crypto.com partnership
data.description:
Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG) closed a deal with Crypto. com to acquire 684. 4 million Cronos (CRO) tokens, marking one of the largest corporate commitments to the digital asset so far. The transaction, valued at roughly $178 million at current prices, was structured as a 50% stock and 50% cash exchange, according to the Sept
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tmtg-acquires-684m-cro-tokens-as-part-of-crypto-com-partnership/

data.title: Trump-Linked WLFI Token Tanks 40% — Whales Crushed as Massive Burn Fails to Save It!
data.description:
The WLFI token, which is linked to former President Donald Trump, has experienced a dramatic decline of 40% in its value, leaving many large investors, often referred to as "whales," feeling the impact of this significant drop. This downturn comes despite efforts to execute a massive token burn aimed at reducing supply and potentially boosting the price, indicating that these measures were insufficient to stabilize the cryptocurrency's market performance. As a result, both casual investors and large stakeholders are left reeling from the consequences of this sudden market shift.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-linked-wlfi-token-tanks-40-whales-crushed-as-massive-burn-fails-to-save-it/

data.title: Trump-Linked WLFI Token Tanks 40% — Whales Crushed as Massive Burn Fails to Save It!
data.description:
The WLFI token, which is associated with former President Donald Trump, experienced a dramatic decline of 40% in its value, leading to significant losses for large investors, commonly referred to as "whales." This plummet occurred despite a substantial token burn effort aimed at boosting its price and market stability, highlighting the persistent challenges faced by the cryptocurrency in maintaining investor confidence and value in an increasingly volatile market.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-linked-wlfi-token-tanks-40-whales-crushed-massive-burn-fails-to-save-it/

data.title: China turns scrutiny on EU products after Europe hits EV tariffs
data.description:
China responded to the European Union’s imposition of tariffs on Chinese-made electric vehicles (EVs) in 2024 by initiating several retaliatory measures targeting products imported from the bloc. The EU justified its tariffs on Chinese EVs by citing an investigation that concluded Chinese EV manufacturers undercut European competitors. China’s trade dispute with the EU evolves The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-scrutiny-on-europe-after-ev-tariffs/
